(2) The minutes of each meeting shall contain a fair and correct summary of the proceedings thereat. (3) All appointments made at any of the meetings aforesaid shall be included in the minutes of the
meeting. (4) In the case of a meeting of the Board of Directors or of a committee of the Board, the minutes shall
